products.name: GILDED WEAVE
products.ProductName: Gilded Weave Premium Canvas Tote Bag for Women
products.description: ✨ PREMIUM GILDED WEAVE TOTE BAG FOR WOMEN This premium canvas tote bag is designed for women who love classy, artistic, and floral styles. Bring nature’s melody wherever you go with The Chirping Garden tote bag. Featuring vibrant tropical birds nestled among lush green foliage, this beautifully illustrated bag captures the harmony of nature in full bloom. Each detail celebrates color, life, and effortless style.this tote offers elegant symmetrical detailing for a truly timeless and eye-catching look. Lightweight yet highly durable, it’s perfect for daily use, university, office, travel, and shopping. The strong knotted double handles and structured finishing make it both stylish and long-lasting. A secure zip closure keeps your belongings safe, while the spacious interior with an inside pocket easily fits your books, laptop/tablet, wallet, and daily essentials. 📏 SIZE CHART (IN INCHES) Length Width Depth 13 16 4 🌸 KEY FEATURES Premium thick canvas material High-quality artistic floral & folk prints Secure zip closure Strong knotted double handles Spacious interior with inside pocket Fits books, laptop/tablet, wallet & accessories Lightweight, durable & eco-friendly Stylish yet practical for everyday use 🧼 CARE INSTRUCTIONS Gently wipe with a soft damp cloth when needed Avoid machine wash to maintain print quality Do not soak in water or use bleach Store in a cool, dry place Keep away from sharp objects to prevent scratches
